mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, email, phone, avatar, status, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = FALSE LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT p.code FROM sys_permission p WHERE p.deleted = FALSE AND p.id IN ( SELECT rp.permission_id FROM sys_role_permission rp WHERE rp.deleted = FALSE AND rp.role_id IN ( SELECT ur.role_id FROM sys_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = FALSE AND ur.role_id IN ( SELECT r.id FROM sys_role r WHERE r.status = 1 AND r.deleted = FALSE ) ) )
SELECT DISTINCT r.code FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = FALSE AND r.status = 1 AND r.id IN ( SELECT ur.role_id FROM sys_user_role ur WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = FALSE )
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nickname}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT r.id, r.name, r.code FROM sys_role r WHERE r.deleted = FALSE AND r.status = 1 AND r.id IN ( SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, avatar = #{avatar}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user_role SET deleted = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user_role (id, user_id, role_id, tenant_id, created_by, updated_by, version) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{roleId}, #{tenantId}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 1)
